mainEntity.name: What if AI hallucinates false info about my LA firm?
mainEntity.text: What if AI hallucinates false info about my LA firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audit regularly, issue corrections via PR and directories to overwrite hallucinations with authoritative data.

suggestedAnswer.text: AI pulls stale data; proactive signals prevent. Use FirmRanker alerts. LA's scrutiny heightens risks. Legal recourse rare—focus prevention. Clients may rely on errors detrimentally.

name: Handling AI Hallucinations for LA Firms
description: Audit regularly, issue corrections via PR and directories to overwrite hallucinations with authoritative data.
